## Description

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Open the preview with `...`
2. Click / scroll / press `...`
3. Observe `...`

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include screenshots or screen recordings if helpful.

## Environment

| Item | Version |
|------|---------|
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17 |
| OS | e.g. macOS 14, Windows 11 |
| React | e.g. 19.x |
| Node | e.g. 22.x |

## Additional Context

Any other information that might help diagnose the issue (console errors, repro repo link, etc.).
